name: site-world
description: Build a complete, agency-grade website — not just a hero. An enforced pipeline: creative-brief interview → pick-one-of-three style tiles (frozen into design tokens) → page blueprint from a curated section library → token-only assembly with tasteful motion → a Playwright screenshot QA loop scored against a rubric. The section library is designed to be harvested and grown from your own shipped projects. Output is plain static HTML/CSS/JS — no framework or platform lock-in.
